name: Canon the Melodious Diva
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>奏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>音</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カノン
desc: If you control a "Melodious" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Canon the Melodious Diva" once per turn this way. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Melodious" monster you control; change its battle position.
mnst_eff: If you control a "Melodious" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Canon the Melodious Diva" once per turn this way. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Melodious" monster you control; change its battle position.
eff: If you control a "Melodious" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Canon the Melodious Diva" once per turn this way. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Melodious" monster you control; change its battle position.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
